name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Iconic Mini By The Way Soft Handbag, reimagined for the 2024-25 Fall/Winter show, featuring a casual and lightweight look. Jacquard fabric material, adorned with the iconic brown FF pattern. Interior features fabric lining, dark brown calfskin trim, and gold hardware. Custom charm and knotted long zipper pull. This bag comes with a top handle and adjustable, detachable, knotted shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody
Size 20.12.9cm 124
